name: XAUUSD M5 Asia-London Range Breakout
hypothesis: The Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) high/low forms an accumulation range. A true breakout during London (07:00-10:00 UTC) with breakout distance >= 0.5 ATR and body >= 1.0 ATR, when range size is 0.5-2.0 ATR, captures directional expansion with PF >= 2.0.

entry_rules.long: current_utc_hour in [7,8,9,10] AND close > asia_high + 0.5*atr14 AND (close-open) >= 1.0*atr14 AND (asia_high-asia_low)/atr14 between 0.5 and 2.0 AND bars_since_london_open <= 9
entry_rules.short: current_utc_hour in [7,8,9,10] AND close < asia_low - 0.5*atr14 AND (open-close) >= 1.0*atr14 AND (asia_high-asia_low)/atr14 between 0.5 and 2.0 AND bars_since_london_open <= 9

regime_filter.rationale: Require minimum trendiness to avoid fakeouts in total chop.

notes: Inspired by asia-london-range-expansion LVC EA (inspiration only). Ensure server TZ mapped to UTC; log signal counts pre-filter.
